businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) operator — Singapore-based global internet company
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Singapore-headquartered global technology company. Q4 2025 results: revenue $6.85B (+38.4% YoY), net income $397.1M. FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%), net income $1.58B (+255%). Closed at $95.52 (+8.23%) on 3/5 — strong rebound from post-earnings -16.5% selloff. Seeking Alpha upgraded to Strong Buy; Barclays cut target $226→$120. P/E 35x, Forward P/E 20.79x, PEG 0.35.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): SE Asia #1 platform. GMV-based commissions and advertising. Q4 +35.8%
Digital finance (Monee/SeaMoney): Digital payments, lending, insurance. Q4 +54.3%, loan book $9.2B (+80%)
Digital entertainment (Garena): Free Fire and other games. Q4 bookings +23.8% YoY
Other: Logistics (Shopee Express), food delivery, etc.
keyProducts: Shopee: #1 e-commerce platform in SE Asia and Latin America
Free Fire: Globally popular battle royale mobile game
SeaMoney/Monee: Digital payment and financial services, $9.2B loan book

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable after selloff. Undervalued vs 38%+ growth

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Attractive factoring in future earnings growth

keyMetrics.name: PEG Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Far below 1. Significantly undervalued relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Improving but VIP program investment pressuring margins

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Strong cash generation. Ample reinvestment capacity

growthDrivers.title: +8.23% strong rebound — post-earnings panic selloff reassessed
growthDrivers.description: QuiverQuant: Investors reassessing the earnings selloff. Refocusing on strong headline revenue growth and profitability improvement.

growthDrivers.title: Seeking Alpha: Strong Buy upgrade — $8.73B net cash
growthDrivers.description: Sharp selloff created a rare buying opportunity. Strong balance sheet and long-term macro tailwinds highlighted.

growthDrivers.title: Barclays cuts $226→$120 — still +25.6% upside
growthDrivers.description: Major target cut but maintains Buy. Still substantial upside from current price.

growthDrivers.title: Monee AI-powered lending acceleration — $9.2B loan book (+80%)
growthDrivers.description: AI-powered underwriting expanding lending universe. 37M active users, NPL 1.1% healthy.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: SE Asia e-commerce #1 (Shopee), 670M population digitalization tailwind. E-commerce-fintech-gaming ecosystem synergy as core moat.

moats.description: Shopee's two-sided seller-buyer network. More sellers → more buyers.
#1 in e-commerce across 6 SE Asian countries. Self-built logistics (Shopee Express).

competitors.name: TikTok Shop/Lazada
competitors.detail: Rapid SE Asian social commerce growth. Shopee's biggest threat

competitors.name: MercadoLibre (MELI)
competitors.detail: Latin America e-commerce #1. Direct competition in Brazil

competitors.name: Grab (GRAB)
competitors.detail: SE Asian super-app. Competing in fintech and delivery

competitors.name: Alibaba/Lazada
competitors.detail: Alibaba financial muscle accelerating SE Asian push

Barclays cuts target $226→$120 — maintains Buy
recentNews.significance: EPS miss reflected but +25.6% upside maintained

recentNews.headline: Bernstein cuts target $170→$150 — maintains Buy
recentNews.significance: Shopee margin pressure reflected but long-term outlook maintained

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: Strong Buy — market panic created rare opportunity
recentNews.significance: Net cash $8.73B, strong balance sheet. Long-term macro tailwinds

recentNews.headline: Fortune: Sea doubles annual earnings yet shares drop 16.5% — worst in 2 years
recentNews.significance: -16.5% selloff was overreaction to EPS miss. Structural growth intact

analystOpinions.notableComment: 11 analysts, Strong Buy consensus. Post-selloff target $179.54 implies +88% upside. Even Barclays at $120 maintains Buy.

risks.title: Post-EPS miss selling pressure may persist
risks.description: Q4 EPS $0.63 missed consensus by $0.28. Near-term sentiment unstable.

risks.title: Monee credit risk
risks.description: Loan book $9.2B (+80%) rapid growth with provisions +66.7%. Economic downturn could expand defaults.

risks.title: SE Asian e-commerce competition intensifying
risks.description: TikTok Shop aggressive expansion and Lazada/Alibaba financial firepower. Margin pressure.

risks.title: Shopee margin pressure — VIP program investment
risks.description: E-commerce margin improvement delayed by VIP program and investment spending.

risks.title: Share dilution
risks.description: YoY +5.54% share count increase. SBC costs.

buyReasons.title: PEG 0.35 — market's most undervalued growth stock
buyReasons.rationale: 38%+ growth at P/E 35x. Abnormal valuation created by selloff.

buyReasons.title: +8.23% strong rebound — bottom formation signal
buyReasons.rationale: +8% one-day rebound from -16.5% drop confirms panic selloff overreaction.

buyReasons.title: Analyst target $180 — +88% upside from current
buyReasons.rationale: 10 of 11 analysts rate Buy. Market consensus is selloff was excessive.

buyReasons.title: Net cash $8.73B — bulletproof balance sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Ample cash for competitive investment and crisis resilience.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited showed a strong +8.23% rebound from the post-earnings -16.5% panic selloff, suggesting the drop was an overreaction.
PEG 0.35 is one of the most undervalued growth stocks in the market. 11 analyst target $180 implies +88% upside.
RSI 32 still near oversold. Below both 50-day $119 and 200-day $151 SMAs, but the strong bounce signals potential bottom.
Monee loan quality (NPL 1.1%) and Shopee competitiveness are key watchpoints. Could be the best buying opportunity of the year for long-term investors.

threads.hook: SE bounces +8.23%! End of the panic selloff? 🔥
threads.text:
A company with +38% revenue and +255% net income dropped -16% on one EPS miss. Then bounced +8% the next day. PEG 0.35, analyst target +88%. Best buy of the year?

→ investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-06

telegram.text:
Sea Limited rebounded +8.23% from its post-earnings -16.5% plunge. Market starting to acknowledge the overreaction.

Q4 revenue $6.85B (+38%), FY net income $1.58B (+255%). A $0.28 EPS miss caused the worst drop in 2 years?

PEG 0.35, net cash $8.73B, 10/11 analysts Buy, target $180 (+88%). RSI 32 oversold — Barclays cut to $120 but still says Buy.
